scripts.update: npx -y npm-check-updates -u -t minor && cd test-ts && npx -y npm-check-updates -u -t minor
scripts.update-major: npx -y npm-check-updates -u && cd test-ts && npx -y npm-check-updates -u
scripts.update-rust: cd test-rust && cargo update && cargo upgrade --incompatible
scripts.update-ts: cd test-ts && npm run update-major && npm install && npm update
